authority_position: Mortgage strategy and equity optimization specialist

hot: MLS listings spike in target market
warm: mortgage broker posting about equity extraction

offers.hook_template: map the savings window before the window closes
offers.compliance_notes: No rate guarantees. Frame as 'analysis' not 'approval prediction.'

offers.pain_match: Clients with locked equity not working for them
offers.hook_template: turn your property into a wealth engine
offers.cta_template: Get the playbook — no commitment required
offers.compliance_notes: Avoid 'guaranteed cash flow.' Frame as strategy framework.

offers.pain_match: Pipeline expanding but equity sitting idle
offers.hook_template: your book has dormant capital that could be working harder
offers.compliance_notes: No promises of specific amounts. Frame as planning tool.

offers.pain_match: Orphaned clients in the market, cold database
offers.hook_template: advisors in your area just went dark — here's how to capture those clients
offers.compliance_notes: No rate promises. Frame as outreach strategy.

offers.pain_match: Clients working with wealth advisors but missing the mortgage optimization layer
offers.hook_template: your investment clients may be leaving wealth on the table in their mortgage structure
offers.cta_template: Get the Smith Manoeuvre briefing for your clients
offers.compliance_notes: No financial advice claims. Frame as educational awareness.
